title: View, troubleshoot, and improve app performance for Power Apps canvas apps
summary: Do you want to know how your app is performing and how to make it better? This learning path will help you identify your apps performance and share ways to troubleshoot your Power Apps canvas app.

sections.title: View, troubleshoot, and improve app performance for Power Apps canvas apps
sections.summary: Do you want to know how your app is performing and how to make it better? This learning path will help you identify your apps performance and share ways to troubleshoot your Power Apps canvas app.

lessons.title: Complete testing and performance checks in a Power Apps canvas app
lessons.content_md:
Do you want to test your app and improve its performance? This module helps you understand how to test an app and improve performance.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/testing-performance-checks-powerapps/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Complete testing and performance checks in a Power Apps canvas app

lessons.title: Use Monitor to troubleshoot Power Apps
lessons.content_md:
Learn how the Monitor tool from Power Apps Studio can help you proactively identify, troubleshoot, and resolve issues within your app.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-to-troubleshoot/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use Monitor to troubleshoot Power Apps

lessons.title: Optimize app load time
lessons.content_md:
Learn how you can evaluate and improve app load times. By regularly reviewing and measuring your app, you can proactively identify and remediate startup performance problems.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/optimize-app-load-time/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Use Power Apps Instrumentation with Application Insights
lessons.content_md:
This module explores how to set up a Microsoft Power Apps canvas app to send telemetry to Application Insights.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/instrumentation-app-insights/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use Power Apps Instrumentation with Application Insights

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica View, troubleshoot, and improve app performance for Power Apps canvas apps
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **View, troubleshoot, and improve app performance for Power Apps canvas apps**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
